title: versioning — model relationships
description: 2 entities. Self-referential migration_target_slug on ApiVersion (a version points at its successor). DeprecationNotice belongsTo ApiVersion. Inbound conventions describe how webhook + notifications-* + subscription reference versions.

internal.description: Self-referential: 'when this version sunsets, subscribers auto-upgrade to migration_target_slug'. Null = no auto-upgrade path (subscribers must manually update).
All deprecation + sunset warning notices published for this version.

inbound.description: Downstream modules FK to ApiVersion via `api_versions.slug` (not `id` — slug is stable, human-readable, and referenced in URLs).
conventions: `webhook::WebhookSubscription.api_version` — nullable FK to api_versions.slug. Null = follow platform default (config('versioning.default'))
`notifications::Notification.metadata.api_version` — the version snapshot at dispatch time. Not an FK; the value is captured on emit and stays event-carried even if the version later sunsets.
`subscription::Subscription.stripe_api_version` — pins Stripe's API version (different from Stackra's api_version). Separate column but same lifecycle pattern.
GraphQL controllers via `#[AsApiSurface(name, versions: [...])]` — build-time compiler validates every declared version exists in the ApiVersion table.
